case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. GENUINA GUNTANG MAUPIN

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MAUPIN, GENUINA GUNTANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCES; (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
